title: Phyto - Stackable potions and weapon coating
description: Coat weapons with potions, which now stack up to 16.
body:
Phyto is an attempt to make potions as versatile as they should be.

All potions now stack to 16 and can be applied to swords, granting a single poisoned strike to your sword.

Every potion effect in the game can be applied simply by using a regular (non-splash or lingering) in your mainhand with a sword or spear of your choice in the offhand.

Can easily be modified to work with other weapons and tools too.

No tick functions
